captured: mail-api-unified-inbox (read-only inbox feed; equivalent to fetch_inbox at the HTTP layer)
api-projects-agents (registered agents list — read-side of register_agent)
drift.notes: Read-only HTTP capture against the locally-running mcp-agent-mail server at 127.0.0.1:8765. Tool-level MCP JSON-RPC calls (POST /mcp body) are not captured here because they require a live MCP client session and would mutate state; the corresponding READ surfaces (/mail/api/unified-inbox, /api/projects/.../agents, /mail/api/locks) cover the same data shape without writes. A follow-up bead should capture MCP tool envelopes via the streamable-http transport once a non-mutating dry-run path lands.
